query: Eiffel Tower height in metres official
answer: The Eiffel Tower's official height is 330 meters (1,083 feet), including its antenna. This height was reached in 2022. It remains the tallest structure in Paris.

results.title: The Eiffel Tower's height increased to 330 meters in 2022 - Facebook
results.snippet: The Eiffel Tower is 330 metres (1,083 ft) tall ... *You can buy tickets for the tower up to two moths in advance from its official website. *

results.title: Eiffel Tower: construction, height, weight, photos - We Build Value
results.snippet: # The Eiffel Tower: history and secrets of the symbol of Paris. * At the time of its inauguration, the Eiffel Tower stood 312 meters (3,358 feet) high, and was the tallest building in the world. This was the ideal location for the engineer who designed the Tower, Gustave Eiffel, to build his office, where he worked and welcomed guests. Inaugurated on March 31, 1889, the **Eiffel Tower** officially opened on May 6 of the same year as a symbol of the Exposition Universelle, the world’s fair held in Paris. ## Paris Tour Eiffel: an underappreciated tower. Despite the uniqueness of its engineering, the **Eiffel Tower** was underappreciated for many years. Eiffel Tower at Sunset in Paris. The intriguing facts and legends connected to the **Eiffel Tower’s construction**, paired with the impact that it had and continues to have on the city, have made this monument so much more than just a feat of modern engineering. After defeating the early skepticism, the **Eiffel Tower** became a **symbol of** **Paris** and an ambassador of French values in the world.
